name: Laser Photonics Corp
summary: Laser Photonics Corp is a vertically integrated manufacturer of photonics-based industrial laser products headquartered in Orlando, Florida. The company offers laser blasting, cleaning, rust removal, de-coating, welding, cutting, and marking solutions targeting automotive, aerospace, shipbuilding, nuclear, and pharmaceutical industries. Following the acquisition of Control Micro Systems, Inc., it expanded into pharmaceutical laser systems for micro-drilling controlled-release tablets. It also develops the Laser Shield Anti-Drone System (LSAD) and reported net revenues of $3.415 million by December 31, 2024.

products.name: CleanTech Professional Portable Finishing Laser 1040 (CTPF-1040)
products.description: Compact, portable high-performance laser system designed for versatility, mobility, and ease of use in cleaning and surface finishing.

products.name: CleanTech Laser Blaster Family
products.description: Standardized high-power laser cleaning and rust removal systems designed to be affordable for small and mid-size companies.

products.name: Laser Shield Anti-Drone System (LSAD)
products.description: Laser defense system designed as an immediate response against small-scale unmanned aerial systems in conflict zones.

products.name: High Power Turbo Piercing (Cold Cutting) Laser Cutting Technology
products.description: Licensed laser cutting technology for manufacturing, selling, exporting, and importing products incorporating cold cutting capabilities.

products.name: CMS Laser Material Processing Systems
products.description: Turnkey laser systems for marking, cutting, drilling, and welding, including pharmaceutical micro-drilling of controlled-release tablets.

partnerships.description: Perpetual worldwide exclusive license to sell Laser Photonics branded equipment for laser cleaning and rust removal in exchange for 3,000,000 shares.
Exclusive worldwide license for high power turbo piercing cold cutting laser technology for $350,000 cash and 1,000,000 restricted shares.
Exclusive worldwide sublicensable license for laser material processing equipment and technology in exchange for 3,000,000 restricted shares.
Joint development of the Laser Shield Anti-Drone System (LSAD) for defense against small-scale unmanned aerial systems.
